steps.title: Add confirming detail
steps.content: The previous sentence says the statues are extremely heavy. The next sentence gives a specific weight, more than 5 tons each, which confirms and strengthens that description.

steps.title: Reject wrong transitions
steps.content: Choice A signals moving on regardless of the prior point. Choice B signals a time shift that is not present. Choice D signals replacement or contrast, but the weight detail supports the prior sentence. The answer is C.
